title: How was the plane able to clear the mountains?

meanings.usage: 指去陌生地方进行探索的人
修饰动词，表示某事顺利完成
指用相机拍摄的图片
指拍摄照片的动作
形容问题、情况等很严重或态度认真
指遭遇的困难或麻烦事
使某人感到担忧或不便
指飞机等突然坠落或猛烈撞击
指撞击或坠落的事件
指高度增加，用于飞机升起、价格上涨等
指上级对下级的命令或要求某物
指指示或安排
指安全通过或越过某物
指看得清楚或理解清楚
形容没有尽头的事物
飞机的总称，复数形式为aircraft
指平坦广阔的地区
指不复杂或朴素的
in sight表示在视野中；out of sight表示看不见
指装东西用的大袋子
表示看起来像某种情况

phrases.usage: 遇到麻烦/困难，指突然遭遇问题

examples.en: They soon ran into serious trouble.
examples.zh: 他们很快遇到了严重的麻烦。

examples.en: The project ran into financial trouble.
examples.zh: 这个项目陷入了财务困境。

phrases.usage: 在某一时刻；在某种程度上

examples.en: At one point, it seemed certain that their plane would crash.
examples.zh: 在某个时刻，看起来他们的飞机肯定会坠毁。

examples.en: At one point, I thought I would give up.
examples.zh: 在某个时刻，我以为我会放弃。

examples.en: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10,000 feet.
examples.zh: 只有上升到一万英尺才能越过这些山脉。

examples.en: She couldn't get over her fear of heights.
examples.zh: 她无法克服恐高症。

phrases.usage: 上升到；上升到某个高度或水平

examples.en: The plane rose to 10,000 feet.
examples.zh: 飞机上升到一万英尺。

examples.en: The temperature will rise to 30 degrees today.
examples.zh: 今天气温将上升到30度。

examples.en: Byrd ordered his men to throw out two heavy food sacks.
examples.zh: 伯德命令他的手下扔出两个沉重的食物袋。

examples.en: Please throw out the trash.
examples.zh: 请把垃圾扔出去。

examples.en: It cleared the mountains by 400 feet.
examples.zh: 它以400英尺的高度越过了山脉。

examples.en: The horse cleared the fence by a foot.
examples.zh: 那匹马以一英尺的高度跃过了栅栏。

examples.en: There were no more mountains in sight.
examples.zh: 眼前再也没有山脉了。

examples.en: The destination was finally in sight.
examples.zh: 目的地终于出现在视野中了。

examples.en: The aircraft was able to fly over the endless white plains without difficulty.
examples.zh: 飞机能够毫无困难地飞越无边无际的白色平原。

examples.en: She finished the test without difficulty.
examples.zh: 她毫不费力地完成了考试。

examples.en: They took photographs of the mountains that lay below.
examples.zh: 他们拍摄了位于下方的山脉照片。

examples.en: A beautiful valley lay below the mountain.
examples.zh: 山下是一片美丽的山谷。

examples.en: Byrd at once ordered his men to throw out two heavy food sacks.
examples.zh: 伯德立刻命令他的手下扔出两个沉重的食物袋。

examples.en: When he heard the news, he left at once.
examples.zh: 他一听到消息就立刻离开了。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，由had + 过去分词构成
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词 + (by + 过去时间/when/before...)
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时。常与before, after, when, by等连用。

examples.en: In 1929, three years after his flight over the North Pole, the American explorer successfully flew over the South Pole.
examples.zh: 1929年，在他飞越北极三年后，这位美国探险家成功飞越了南极。

examples.en: By the time we arrived, the train had left.
examples.zh: 当我们到达时，火车已经开走了。

grammar.title: be able to 的用法
grammar.definition: 表示"能够；会"，强调通过努力成功做到某事
grammar.structure: 主语 + be (was/were) able to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: be able to 表示成功完成某事的能力，强调克服困难后成功。与can相比，be able to 更强调成功的意味，可用于各种时态。

examples.en: Byrd and his men were able to take a great many photographs.
examples.zh: 伯德和他的手下能够拍摄大量照片。

examples.en: The plane was then able to rise and it cleared the mountains by 400 feet.
examples.zh: 飞机随后能够上升，以400英尺的高度越过了山脉。

examples.en: Byrd now knew that he would be able to reach the South Pole.
examples.zh: 伯德现在知道他能够到达南极。

grammar.title: if 引导的真实条件句
grammar.definition: 表示真实可能发生的情况，if从句用一般现在时，主句用一般将来时
grammar.structure: If + 主语 + 动词现在式..., 主语 + will/can + 动词原形...
grammar.usage: 用于讨论真实、可能发生的条件。当条件满足时，结果就会发生。if表示"如果；要是"。

examples.en: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10,000 feet.
examples.zh: 只有上升到一万英尺才能越过这些山脉。

examples.en: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay at home.
examples.zh: 如果明天下雨，我就待在家里。

original.en: Byrd and his men were able to take a great many photographs of the mountains that lay below.
original.zh: 伯德和他的手下能够拍摄位于下方的山脉的大量照片。

imitations.en: The rescue team was able to reach the survivors in time.
imitations.zh: 救援队能够及时到达幸存者那里。

imitations.en: She was able to solve the difficult problem alone.
imitations.zh: 她能够独自解决这个难题。

original.en: At one point, it seemed certain that their plane would crash.
original.zh: 在某个时刻，看起来他们的飞机肯定会坠毁。

imitations.en: It seemed certain that they would win the championship.
imitations.zh: 看起来他们肯定会赢得冠军。

imitations.en: It seemed certain that the storm would destroy the town.
imitations.zh: 看起来风暴肯定会摧毁这个城镇。

original.en: It could only get over the mountains if it rose to 10,000 feet.
original.zh: 只有上升到一万英尺才能越过这些山脉。

imitations.en: You can only succeed if you work hard.
imitations.zh: 只有努力工作才能成功。

imitations.en: The patient can only recover if he follows the doctor's advice.
imitations.zh: 只有遵从医嘱，病人才能康复。

original.en: For there were no more mountains in sight.
original.zh: 因为眼前再也没有山脉了。

imitations.en: There were no more obstacles in sight.
There were no more difficulties in sight.
